normalized_title: City of Fremantle Local Planning Policy 2.3 - Fremantle Port Buffer Area Development Guidelines
scope_summary: Sets built form criteria and referral procedures for development applications and scheme amendments on lots within the three Fremantle Port Buffer Areas mapped in Appendix A. Area 1 carries the strictest controls (risk assessment for large residential proposals, glazing/window, balcony, air-conditioning and construction standards, prohibition of sensitive non-residential uses, and title notifications); Area 2 applies lesser construction standards including SPP 5.4 Quiet House requirements; Area 3 manages sensitive uses case-by-case. Also prescribes referral of proposals to Fremantle Ports and certification of compliance conditions.

key_numeric_standards.applies_to: development in Area 1 (attenuation of port noise)
